name: merit-aktiva-workspace
description: Merit Aktiva accounting + Merit Palk payroll for Claude Code — full API coverage via the elnora-merit CLI, plus how-to skills for the correct Merit procedure: accounting (sales/purchase invoices, payments/bank reconciliation, VAT/KMD, reports, reverse charge) and payroll (employees & contracts, monthly salaries/withholdings/absences, salary & GL reports, per-employee settings), agents, and slash commands. Bundles LHV's official read-only bank MCP server, so an LHV statement imports straight into Merit with no file export.
